overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment interior from Cyberpunk 2077. The player slowly pans left across a kitchen counter with various consumable items before moving toward a wall with futuristic audio equipment and an iridescent beaded curtain doorway, all bathed in moody teal neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment kitchen counter with rainy window view

events.description: game UI popup appears identifying 'REAL WATER (STILL)' consumable item on the counter
camera pans left past the coffee maker toward the audio equipment wall

agents.ego_description: examining consumable items and dishes on the kitchen counter

entered.detail: large window with rain droplets streaking down the glass, showing dark city outside
tall stack of clean white ceramic plates on the counter
futuristic silver and white coffee maker with multiple reservoirs
fast food bag with 'TACO' visible in red letters
transparent plastic water bottle with label
dark amber glass bottle, likely containing beer or liquor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cyberpunk apartment kitchen counter bathed in teal neon light. A rainy window looms in the background while the camera focuses on everyday items including a stack of plates, a coffee maker, a taco bag, and bottles. The player interacts with a water bottle triggering a UI popup, then begins panning left along the counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: wall-mounted audio system with waveform displays

events.description: game UI popup changes to identify 'NICOLA (BEER)' bottle on the counter
UI popup disappears as player looks away from the bottle toward the audio rack

agents.ego_description: shifting attention from kitchen items to examine the audio equipment wall

entered.detail: futuristic white audio rack with multiple components and glowing displays
two screens showing white audio waveforms against black background
vertical strip of glowing red LED lights between the waveform displays
shelf above the audio equipment holding various containers and items

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to reveal a high-tech audio setup with dual waveform displays and red LED indicators. The kitchen items exit view to the right while the player briefly interacts with a beer bottle before focusing on the audio equipment. An iridescent beaded curtain becomes visible in the distant left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: doorway with iridescent beaded curtain leading to bathroom

events.description: camera approaches the beaded curtain revealing bathroom area beyond

agents.ego_description: approaching the beaded curtain doorway leading to the bathroom area

entered.detail: hanging curtain made of reflective circular discs creating a shimmering barrier
mirror reflecting the neon-lit bathroom interior visible through the curtain
horizontal cyan neon light strip above the bathroom mirror
dark metal door frame surrounding the bathroom entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on an iridescent beaded curtain that separates the kitchen from a bathroom area. The audio equipment and counter items exit view as the camera centers on the shimmering curtain, revealing a neon-lit bathroom with a mirror visible through the hanging discs. The movement slows as the player approaches the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit cyberpunk kitchen that transitions into a view of a shimmering, neon-lit doorway. It begins focused on a kitchen counter bathed in teal neon light, where a rainy window looms behind a collection of plates, a coffee maker, and a taco bag. As the camera pans left, the domestic clutter gives way to a high-tech audio setup featuring dual waveform displays and red LED indicators. The scene then shifts further left, moving past the electronics to center on an iridescent beaded curtain that separates the room from a bathroom. The movement finally slows as the camera approaches the shimmering discs, revealing a mirror and a glow of neon light within the adjacent room.
